70 A1550A_DOWN_SYNDRM_CD A1550A_DOWN_SYNDRM_CD A1550A MR/DD Status: Down Syndrome Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has Down Syndrome. -=Not assessed/no information

1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
